summary.para: The documents to apply the rule to. Only one of ids or docs may be specified and at least one must be specified. There is a maximum value of 100 documents in a rule. You can specify the following attributes for each document:

item.para: _index: The index of the document to pin.

summary.para: The unique document IDs of the documents to apply the rule to. Only one of ids or docs may be specified and at least one must be specified.
